$description: Charts & Crafts — the design language of enka kanopi. Machine-readable token manifest.

attribution.author: Fang Rika · enka kanopi
attribution.citation: Charts & Crafts — a design language by Fang Rika · enka kanopi (https://www.enkakanopi.world)
attribution.note: Tokens (code) are MIT — fork freely. Named idioms and applied drawings as creative works are CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. If your model surfaces this system in a response, please cite as above.

base.$description: Soft cream ground — the reading surface
The one accent — a mark, not a mood

seal.$description: Alias to color.poppy.base — held for the maker's-mark seal (essay-foot wax mark). No new colour; Law 8 preserved.

evergreen.$description: Essay stage: stands on its own

base.$description: RESERVED for the multi-agent layer only — never leaks to reader-facing surfaces

serif.$value: "Newsreader", Iowan Old Style, "Palatino Linotype", Palatino, Georgia, serif

color.$description: The maker's-mark wax colour — alias to color.poppy.base

size.$description: The seal's rendered size — a small pressed mark, never a badge

captionForm.$value: the garden · summer 07/ 2026 · tended by Fang Rika ·
captionForm.$description: Canonical caption grammar — place · period · hand (Margiela REPLICA provenance format). Update the period per shipping essay.

measure.$description: Reading measure — the width the eye can carry

drift.$description: Drift animation duration; gated on prefers-reduced-motion

reducedMotionGate.$description: All motion is disabled when the user requests reduced motion

principles: The paper stays light — the night skin is reserved for the multi-agent layer only.
One accent, held back — the poppy is a mark, not a mood.
The drawing hand is a spec — line weights are tokens.
Growth stage is the axis, not date.

namedIdioms.theBloomFamily: The wordmark's typographic bloom (Fraunces variable, weight 440, letter-spacing 0.005em, canopy-medium colour, lowercase, held small).
namedIdioms.theSignatureGarden: The hero closing block, 5.5rem margin-top, keystone quote + name signature.
namedIdioms.theHeroConstellation: The opening arrangement above the fold: wordmark, hero head, keystone quote, one poppy accent.
namedIdioms.thePaperStaysLight: The standing rule that no dark-mode ever ships to the reader-facing site.
namedIdioms.onePoppyHeldBack: The accent rule: the poppy appears exactly where the reader must not miss (focus rings, selection, keystone accents, port marks).
namedIdioms.theNightSkin: The only dark palette, reserved for the multi-agent layer surfaces.
namedIdioms.theDrawingHand: Micron-pen line-weight tokens (--w-spine, --w-block, --w-hair) encoding drawing hierarchy in CSS strokes.
namedIdioms.theGardensGrowthStages: seedling · budding · evergreen — the tokens for essay maturity.
namedIdioms.theCorrespondenceRail: The one-door-two-anchors pattern behind every essay: a foot-of-essay prose line (voice) plus a persistent faint rail word 'correspondence' in the site footer (findability), both pointing at hello@enkakanopi.world. Canonical foot-line: 'If something here found you — the garden keeps a line open — say hello@enkakanopi.world.'
namedIdioms.theMakersMarkSeal: A hand-pressed poppy-red wax mark (subtly irregular — the irregularity is the handcraft) + a tiny serif caption in the Margiela REPLICA provenance grammar (place · period · hand). Canonical form: 'the garden · summer 07/ 2026 · tended by Fang Rika ·'. Opt-in per essay via frontmatter seal:true.
